11.title: Incoming log events
11.query:
timeseries incoming_log_events_sum = avg(cloud.aws.logs.incoming_log_events_sum), by: {dt.entity.custom_device}
| fieldsAdd incoming_log_events_sum_value = arrayAvg(incoming_log_events_sum)
| fields dt.entity.custom_device, incoming_log_events_sum_value
| sort incoming_log_events_sum_value desc
| limit 20

12.title: Forwarded log events
12.query:
timeseries forwarded_log_events_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name = avg(cloud.aws.logs.forwarded_log_events_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name), by: {dt.entity.custom_device, DestinationType, FilterName}
| fieldsAdd forwarded_log_events_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value = arrayAvg(forwarded_log_events_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name)
| fields dt.entity.custom_device, DestinationType, FilterName, forwarded_log_events_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value
| sort forwarded_log_events_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value desc
| limit 20

13.title: Incoming bytes
13.query:
timeseries incoming_bytes_sum = avg(cloud.aws.logs.incoming_bytes_sum), by: {dt.entity.custom_device}
| fieldsAdd incoming_bytes_sum_value = arrayAvg(incoming_bytes_sum)
| fields dt.entity.custom_device, incoming_bytes_sum_value
| sort incoming_bytes_sum_value desc
| limit 20

14.title: Forwarded bytes
14.query:
timeseries forwarded_bytes_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name = avg(cloud.aws.logs.forwarded_bytes_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name), by: {dt.entity.custom_device, DestinationType, FilterName}
| fieldsAdd forwarded_bytes_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value = arrayAvg(forwarded_bytes_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name)
| fields dt.entity.custom_device, DestinationType, FilterName, forwarded_bytes_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value
| sort forwarded_bytes_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value desc
| limit 20

15.title: Delivery throttling
15.query:
timeseries delivery_throttling_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name = avg(cloud.aws.logs.delivery_throttling_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name), by: {dt.entity.custom_device, DestinationType, FilterName}
| fieldsAdd delivery_throttling_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value = arrayAvg(delivery_throttling_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name)
| fields dt.entity.custom_device, DestinationType, FilterName, delivery_throttling_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value
| sort delivery_throttling_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value desc
| limit 20

16.title: Delivery errors
16.query:
timeseries delivery_errors_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name = avg(cloud.aws.logs.delivery_errors_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name), by: {dt.entity.custom_device, DestinationType, FilterName}
| fieldsAdd delivery_errors_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value = arrayAvg(delivery_errors_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name)
| fields dt.entity.custom_device, DestinationType, FilterName, delivery_errors_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value
| sort delivery_errors_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name_value desc
| limit 20
